attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Nizar Al Rashdan (Jordan) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt missed. Nizar Al Rashdan (Jordan) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Mahmoud Al Mardi with a cross following a set piece situation.

events.description: 尼扎尔-拉什丹射门偏出。 穆罕默德-马尔迪参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Amine Gouiri (Algeria) right footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Farès Chaïbi.

events.description: 阿明·古伊里射门偏出。 法雷斯·沙伊比参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Algeria. Conceded by Mohannad Abu Taha.
Foul by Mahmoud Al Mardi (Jordan).
Attempt saved. Mousa Al Tamari (Jordan) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Luca Zidane (Algeria). Assisted by Ali Olwan.

events.description: 穆萨·阿尔塔马里射正。 阿里·奥尔文参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Ibrahim Maza.

events.description: 法雷斯·沙伊比射门被封堵。 易卜拉欣·马扎参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Ali Olwan (Jordan) right footed shot from a difficult angle and long range on the right is saved in the centre of the goal by Luca Zidane (Algeria).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Algeria. Conceded by Noor Al Rawabdeh.
Attempt saved. Amine Gouiri (Algeria) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Yazeed Abulaila (Jordan). Assisted by Ibrahim Maza.

events.description: 阿明·古伊里射正。 易卜拉欣·马扎参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ramiz Zerrouki (Algeria).
Attempt saved. Riyad Mahrez (Algeria) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Yazeed Abulaila (Jordan). Assisted by Hicham Boudaoui with a through ball.

events.description: 里亚德·马赫雷斯射正。 希查姆·布道维参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Algeria. Conceded by Yazeed Abulaila.
Handball by Rayan Aït-Nouri (Algeria).

events.description: 尼扎尔·阿拉什丹 进球，穆萨·阿尔塔马里 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Mousa Al Tamari (Jordan) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Mohannad Abu Taha.

events.description: 穆萨·阿尔塔马里射门偏出。 阿布-塔哈参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Ibrahim Maza (Algeria) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Rafik Belghali (Algeria).
Offside, Jordan. Ali Olwan is caught offside.

events.description: 拉米兹·泽鲁基 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ramiz Zerrouki (Algeria).
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ali Olwan (Jordan) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Husam Abu Dahab.

events.description: 阿里·奥尔文射门偏出。 胡萨姆-达哈卜参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
First Half ends, Jordan 1, Algeria 0.

Attempt blocked. Rafik Belghali (Algeria) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Aïssa Mandi.

events.description: 拉菲克·贝尔加利射门被封堵。 艾萨·曼迪参与进攻。
